vllm.title: [FIX] Simplify sampler logic
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt: As we only have one seq for the prompt seq group, we don't need these ifs in the code logic.

vllm.title: Fix config for Falcon
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, vLLM does not read the number of KV heads correctly and thus returns gibberish outputs for Falcon-40B model. This PR fixes the bug.

vllm.title: Align `max_tokens` behavior with openai
vllm.author: HermitSun
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As OpenAI's API doc says, max_tokens is an optional int param which defaults to inf. And since there is no official int inf in Python, we have two ways to trigger this param's default behavior:

Simply not pass this param when requests, and pydantic will set it to 16 for us.

  
    
      vllm/vllm
